dependencies.name: perfect-freehand
dependencies.usage: Natural pen strokes with pressure and taper simulation
dependencies.modification: Wrapped behind deterministic seed-driven interface; all random effects are seeded

dependencies.name: d3-shape
dependencies.usage: Organic curve, contour and area path generation
dependencies.modification: Curve factory wrappers with coordinate clamping

dependencies.name: bezier-js
dependencies.usage: Bezier curve sampling, tangent, offset and intersection
dependencies.modification: Deterministic sampling wrappers with bounded iteration

dependencies.name: culori
dependencies.usage: Perceptual color space palette generation, lightness and warm/cool relationships
dependencies.modification: Seed-driven palette generation; palette caching for stability

dependencies.name: simplex-noise
dependencies.usage: Deterministic paper grain, ink texture, material and natural contour perturbation
dependencies.modification: Seeded noise factory with coordinate domain clamping
